# RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.enableDisplayedNotifications

**Case**

Ask the user to enable sending displayed notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
case enableDisplayedNotifications
```

## Handling local behavior actions

- **RCSService.Business.SuggestedAction.Action.sendDeviceSpecifics**: Request specifics about the user’s device.
